message:
🐛 fix(kube-chess): address Copilot review on #7896 — dead minimax branch + EP comment (#7901) (#7903)

Two Copilot review comments on merged PR #7896:

1. Minimax returned 0 for `result === 'repetition'`, but `makeMove` inside
   the search tree runs with `trackHistory=false` (by design, for perf) so
   `positionHistory` never accumulates and `getGameResult` can never return
   `'repetition'` during search. The branch was dead. Removed it and added
   a comment so the omission is clearly deliberate, not forgotten.

2. `positionKey` includes an en-passant square whenever a side-to-move
   pawn is geometrically positioned to capture it. Strict FIDE would also
   require that the capture doesn't leave the capturer's king in check
   (pin). We accept that approximation to keep positionKey O(1) and
   allocation-free — it's the same approximation Stockfish-style Zobrist
   hashing uses, and the divergence is only reachable in contrived pin
   positions. Expanded the comment to document the trade-off explicitly.

Fixes #7901

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
